Thanks for contributing to OpenSwarm! Please read CONTRIBUTING.md first.
Keep the PR focused on one concern.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123. Open an issue first if one doesn't exist. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (added/updated tests where relevant)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
